name: Breath
description: Cała klawiatura oddycha – zapala się i gaśnie. Można wyłączyć synchronizację.
code:
speed = params.get('speed', 0.05)
brightness = params.get('brightness', 1.0)
rainbow = params.get('rainbow', False)
color = params.get('color', [0, 100, 255])
sync = params.get('sync', True)
grad_on = params.get('gradientOn', False)
grad_colors = [c for c in params.get('gradientColors', []) if sum(c)>0]
for key_name, virtual_id in key_map.items():
    base = virtual_id * 3
    if base + 2 >= 384: continue
    phase_offset = 0 if sync else (virtual_id * 0.05)
    pulse = (math.sin(t * speed * 30 + phase_offset) + 1) / 2 * brightness
    if rainbow:
        hue = (t * speed * 5 + phase_offset * 0.2) % 1.0
        r, g, b = colorsys.hsv_to_rgb(hue, 1.0, pulse)
    elif grad_on and grad_colors:
        n = len(grad_colors)
        if n == 1:
            c = grad_colors[0]
            r, g, b = c[0]/255.0*pulse, c[1]/255.0*pulse, c[2]/255.0*pulse
        else:
            grad_phase = (t * speed * 5 + phase_offset * 0.2) % 1.0
            p = grad_phase * n
            idx1 = int(p) % n
            idx2 = (idx1 + 1) % n
            frac = p - int(p)
            c1, c2 = grad_colors[idx1], grad_colors[idx2]
            r = (c1[0]*(1-frac) + c2[0]*frac) / 255.0 * pulse
            g = (c1[1]*(1-frac) + c2[1]*frac) / 255.0 * pulse
            b = (c1[2]*(1-frac) + c2[2]*frac) / 255.0 * pulse
    else:
        r = color[0] / 255.0 * pulse
        g = color[1] / 255.0 * pulse
        b = color[2] / 255.0 * pulse
    matrix[base] = int(r * 255)
    matrix[base+1] = int(g * 255)
    matrix[base+2] = int(b * 255)
